phase1.task_description:
Any capitalization of `NaN` and `Inf` are parsed as imaginary numbers with uppercase suffix `J`
This issue seems related to #1288 and #1294. Floating-point special values such as `NaN` and `Inf` are required to be capitalized exactly as such, but when used in imaginary number literals with _uppercase_ `J` suffix, any capitalization is allowed. In the same spirit as #1288, I believe this is unintended/undesired behavior.

```hy
NaNj ; valid (good)
NANj ; invalid (good)
Infj ; valid (good)
i
